creator: msl0000023508@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #8)

> Was an application running at the time you shut down your ppp session? Were you pinging some address or was your computer replying to a ping at the time?

Right before the kernel panic occurred, this server is just accepted an incoming PPP over SSH connection, ppp(8) was started to handle this connection; ppp(8) then uses tun2. 2 seconds later an old PPP over SSH connection uses tun0 is destroyed.
